title: April 2018 Newsletter
summary: Appointments and Committee Changes | U.S. Coast Guard Changes | Salmon FMP | Charter Halibut Permit (CHP) Renewal | Mixing of Guided and Unguided Halibut | Salmon Bycatch | GOA Chinook PSC | Cooperative Reports | Halibut Retention in Pots | BSAI Halibut Abundance-based Management of PSC Limits | Staff Tasking | Regulatory Reform | Research Priorities | Northern Edge 2017 Report | Charter Halibut Economic Data | Community Engagement and Outreach | NIOSH Report | Upcoming Meetings Appointments and Committee Changes Four new members were appointed to the Social Science Planning Team : Sally Bibb (NMFS Regional Office) to replace Rachel Baker; Mike Fey (AKFIN); Dr. Mike Downs (SSC member); and Dr. Elizabeth Figus (Council staff). The Chair also appointed new industry and Electronic Monitoring (EM) provider members to the EM Workgroup , as its focus changes from fixed gear to a trawl EM development. Agency representation on the Workgroup remains unchanged. The Workgroup will hold a joint me...

title: Blue Moon Marquee
summary: April 9, 2018 Hailing from Alberta’s wild rose country, Cree/Metis guitarist and vocalist A.W. Cardinal and multi-instrumentalist Jasmine Colette form the band Blue Moon Marquee. Influenced by artists from Lonnie Johnson and Django Reinhardt to Tom Waits, the duo brings contemporary sounds and Nativ...
